final:
module RefModule(
    input [7:0] data,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst)
            q <= 8'b00000000;
        else
            q <= data;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
